form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 2nd in a small field at this track on February 19 over 1207m, 6 len behind Oneofthegoodguys carrying 54.5kg at $4.30. Second-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.75 len at this track March 26 over 1207m defeating Yuletide Gallop carrying 54.5kg at $13.60. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of 14 months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Aqueduct February 6 2025 over 1408m, 1.75 len behind Commerce Comet carrying 55kg at $2.05. When resuming last campaign third of 7 at Saratoga July 27 2024 over 1408m, 2.5 len behind Amundson carrying 56kg at $4.65. Expect a forward showing.
